h3: Canada-United States: Overview and federal supports
Beware of suspicious messages, report them!

sections.heading: Managing your money
items: Housing, budgeting, banking, money transfers, insurance and planning your finances at different life stages.

sections.heading: Consumer affairs
items: Solutions for everyday consumer topics like complaint resolution and consumer protection.

sections.heading: Debt and borrowing
items: Managing debt, credit cards, mortgages, loans, lines of credit, credit reports and more.

sections.heading: Education funding
items: Scholarships, paying for your education, RESPs, budgeting tips and paying off student debt.

sections.heading: Pensions and retirement
items: Retirement planning, public and registered pensions, RRSPs, RRIFs, retirement income calculator and more.

sections.heading: Financial tools and calculators
items: Tools to help you choose a bank account and credit card, including budget and mortgage calculators.

sections.heading: Savings and investments
items: Savings and investment types, setting goals and choosing a financial advisor.

sections.heading: Taxes
items: Tax information for individuals, businesses, charities and trusts.

sections.heading: Financial literacy programs
items: Educational materials to help students and adults increase their financial knowledge and skills.

sections.heading: Business financing and support
items: Grants and contributions, loans, tax credits, wage subsidies and other business support.

sections.heading: Protection from frauds and scams
items: Identity theft, types of fraud, counterfeit money and other threats or scams.

sections.heading: Government finances
items: How the government manages its finances through the federal budget, planned spending and reports on expenses.

sections.heading: Financial and money services regulation
items: Plan and trust administration, financial transaction reporting, the regulation of financial institutions and more.

sections.heading: Insolvency
items: Consumer proposals, bankruptcy and how to find a Licensed Insolvency Trustee.

sections.heading: Canada-United States: Overview and federal supports
items: All Canada-U.S. support and information geared to Canadian businesses and individuals, including on importing, local products, travelling, and more.

sections.heading: Buying, selling and supporting Canadian
items: Find information on Made in Canada labels, how to buy Canadian and the benefits of shopping and travelling in Canada.

sections.heading: Beware of suspicious messages, report them!
items: Learn how to recognize suspicious text messages and report them safely to help protect yourself.

sections.heading: Canada’s government surplus marketplace
items: Shop GCSurplus for affordable government surplus items (furniture, vehicles and more) and support sustainability nationwide.
